name: Kotak League Platinum Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 4X reward points on all weekend spends (Saturday & Sunday)
2 Reward Points per ₹150 spent on weekday transactions

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver for the next year

additionalBenefits: 4X reward points on all weekend transactions
Domestic and international airport lounge access
Easy EMI conversion on transactions above ₹2,500
pros: 4X reward points on weekends is excellent for those who shop primarily on weekends
Includes 1 complimentary international lounge visit which is rare in this segment
Welcome bonus of 1500 RP offsets part of the joining fee
Mastercard Platinum benefits and global acceptance
Achievable fee waiver threshold of ₹2 lakh annually
cons: Base weekday reward rate of 0.33% is below average
Only 1 international lounge visit per year is limited
3.5% foreign currency markup is on the higher side
Reward point value at ₹0.25 per point is relatively low
idealFor: Weekend shoppers who do most of their spending on Saturdays and Sundays
Users looking for a mid-tier card with both domestic and international lounge access
Those who prefer Mastercard network benefits over Visa

faqs.question: What counts as a weekend spend for 4X rewards?
faqs.answer: Any transaction made on Saturday or Sunday qualifies for 4X reward points. The transaction date (not posting date) is considered for determining weekend eligibility.

faqs.question: How do I access international airport lounges?
faqs.answer: You get 1 complimentary international airport lounge visit per year through the Mastercard lounge program. Present your card at participating lounges for access.

faqs.question: Can I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: Yes, spend ₹2,00,000 or more in a membership year and the next year's annual fee of ₹1,500 will be waived automatically.
